542.reason: [The program always outputs to both parser.txt and error.txt regardless of whether errors exist. According to the problem requirements, correct programs should only output syntax analysis results to parser.txt, while erroneous programs should only output error information to error.txt. This implementation violates that requirement by writing to both files unconditionally.]
